purpose: Current VS Code Java warnings, normalized and sorted for goal-driven cleanup.

categories.title: IDE build model reload notice
categories.recommendedAction: Reload Java/Gradle project in VS Code; no code change needed unless notice remains after reload.
categories.completionNote: Resolved by reloading the VS Code Java/Gradle project; current IDE warnings are limited to the high-risk PlayerLoginEvent and ChatColor categories.

categories.title: Low risk unused import
categories.recommendedAction: Remove unused imports after checking the file still compiles.
categories.completionNote: Resolved by removing unused Messages import from StatsCommand.

categories.title: Low risk JavaPlugin#getDescription deprecation
categories.recommendedAction: Replace plugin.getDescription() usages with current plugin metadata API if behavior is equivalent.
categories.completionNote: Resolved by replacing JavaPlugin#getDescription().getVersion() with getPluginMeta().getVersion().

categories.title: Null-safety and type warnings
categories.recommendedAction: Handle in small slices; prefer explicit null checks or type-correct keys, and avoid broad defensive wrappers.
categories.completionNote: Resolved by adding local null checks for block interactions and Discord voice config, using primitive consumers for integer settings, fixing UUID map keys in Armor_Vs_Health, and suppressing the Bukkit Attribute enum false positive in PlayerUtils.

categories.title: Static config init methods likely used reflectively
categories.recommendedAction: Do not delete blindly; verify PluginStaticConfig reflection path before changing. Likely document or leave unless a real safe fix exists.
categories.completionNote: These init methods are reflection entry points invoked by PluginStaticConfig#invokeInit; kept behavior unchanged and suppressed only the local unused-method warnings.

categories.title: High risk PlayerLoginEvent deprecation
categories.recommendedAction: Treat as a dedicated login-gate slice; do not hide with wrapper or suppress. Requires behavior analysis and server test.

diagnostics.message: The type PlayerLoginEvent is deprecated since version 1.21.6
The type PlayerLoginEvent is deprecated since version 1.21.6
The type PlayerLoginEvent is deprecated since version 1.21.6
The type PlayerLoginEvent is deprecated since version 1.21.6
The type PlayerLoginEvent is deprecated since version 1.21.6

categories.analysisNote: PlayerLoginEvent replacement was checked against Paper 1.21.11 sources. The suggested PlayerConnectionValidateLoginEvent exposes a connection/profile but not a fully initialized Bukkit Player. Current checks use Player permissions, PlayerCollection.contains(Player), and game-state join gates, so replacing it would change login timing and player-visible allow/kick behavior. Do not hide these warnings with @SuppressWarnings or a wrapper; keep them visible until Step 22 Login Gate Migration redesigns and tests the login gate.

categories.title: High risk ChatColor model deprecation
categories.recommendedAction: Treat as a dedicated color-model slice; affects team public API, menus, scoreboard, and YAML compatibility.
categories.analysisNote: ChatColor warnings are tied to the plugin color model, not isolated imports. The affected files include the public UHCTeam API, runtime team color/prefix storage, ColorPickerMenu generic type, scoreboard Heart_Color YAML compatibility, and menu/scoreboard display paths. Replacing this safely requires a dedicated color-model migration with compatibility tests, so these warnings remain accepted for now instead of being hidden with suppressions.

resolved.note: Removed unused org.mcwonderland.uhc.settings.Messages import from StatsCommand.
Replaced deprecated JavaPlugin#getDescription() version reads with getPluginMeta().getVersion().
